title: Gear Second Changes the Fight
description: Luffy catches up to Blueno and begins a decisive clash that reveals how far he is willing to go to save Robin.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Spandam, Luffy, Blueno, Enies Lobby guard, CP9 agent. Luffy catches up to Blueno and begins a decisive clash that reveals how far he is willing to go to save Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There's no way to climb up there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How many CPP members did you see?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: We've gotta hurry and save Nico Robin!!!

summary: Luffy catches up to Blueno and begins a decisive clash that reveals how far he is willing to go to save Robin.
